trigger.Name: NachaloNachalo_cin
trigger.script:
Fly("start_game", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 2, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
AddCinematicMessage( 77771, 0.1 )
TActivate("Nachalo_cin_music") TActivate("Nachalo_cin")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin
trigger.script:
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka", -1, -1, CVector(365.072, 267.749, 3804.056), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka1", -1, -1, CVector(852.300, 283.728, 3853.403), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka2", -1, -1, CVector(878.169, 279.669, 3262.125), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka3", -1, -1, CVector(922.145, 270.257, 2956.118), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka4", -1, -1, CVector(1012.725, 291.099, 2555.795), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0)
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId()
local CToch = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") local CTochID = CToch:GetId()
local Plf1 = GetPlayerVehicle() local Plf1ID = GetPlayerVehicleId()
local CToch1 = GetEntityByName("CamTochka1") local CToch1ID = CToch1:GetId()
local Plf2 = GetPlayerVehicle() local Plf2ID = GetPlayerVehicleId()
local CToch2 = GetEntityByName("CamTochka2") local CToch2ID = CToch2:GetId()
local Plf3 = GetPlayerVehicle() local Plf3ID = GetPlayerVehicleId()
local CToch3 = GetEntityByName("CamTochka3") local CToch3ID = CToch3:GetId()
local Plf4 = GetPlayerVehicle() local Plf4ID = GetPlayerVehicleId()
local CToch4 = GetEntityByName("CamTochka4") local CToch4ID = CToch4:GetId()
FlyLinked( "Nachalo_cam01", CTochID, 12, 1, 0, PlfID ) FlyLinked( "Nachalo_cam02", CToch1ID, 19, 0, 0, Plf1ID ) FlyLinked( "Nachalo_cam03", CToch2ID, 10, 0, 0, Plf2ID ) Fly("Nachalo_cam04", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 9, 0, 0 ) Fly("Nachalo_cam05", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 4, 0, 0 ) Fly("Nachalo_cam06", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 7, 0, 0 ) Fly("Nachalo_cam07", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 24, 0, 0 ) Fly("Nachalo_cam08", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 52, 0, 0 ) Fly("Nachalo_cam09", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 15, 0, 0 ) Fly("Nachalo_cam10", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 9, 0, 0 ) FlyLinked( "Nachalo_cam11", CToch3ID, 5, 0, 0, Plf3ID ) FlyLinked( "Nachalo_cam12", CToch4ID, 14, 0, 1, Plf4ID ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
AddCinematicMessage( 0, 3.5 )
TActivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_2" ) TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_3" ) TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_5") TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_6" ) TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_7" ) TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_8") TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_9" ) TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_10" ) TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_11" ) TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_12" ) TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("1_path") vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_dop_5
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 4, 0.5 )
PlayCustomMusic("agriculruar_town1")
CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller_felix", "humPlayer", -1, -1, CVector(929.704, 267.326, 2988.015), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.7518, 0.0000, 0.6593), 0)
CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller3", "humDed", -1, -1, CVector(914.367, 266.931, 3016.739), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.8940, 0.0000, 0.4481), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller06", "humHoz", -1, -1, CVector(922.804, 267.126, 2986.854), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.6018, 0.0000, 0.7986), 1)
getObj("humHoz"):SetNodeAction(AT_STAND2) getObj("humHoz"):SetNextForAnimation(AT_STAND2, AT_STAND1)
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("1_path") vehPlayer:PlaceToEndOfPath("1_path") vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(928.060, 268.118, 2980.698)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.006, 0.998, 0.002, 0.066)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_dop_7
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 6, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 7, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 8, 0.5 )
getObj("humDed"):SetNodeAction(AT_RESERVED1) getObj("humDed"):SetNextForAnimation(AT_RESERVED1, AT_STAND1)
local humPl = GetEntityByName("humPlayer") if humPl then humPl:Remove() end
CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller_felix", "humPlayer1", -1, -1, CVector(916.165, 267.055, 3015.550), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.4127, 0.0000, 0.9109), 0) TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_71") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_72")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_dop_8
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 9, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 10, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 12, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 13, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 14, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 15, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 16, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 17, 0.5 )
TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_81") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_82") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_83") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_84") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_85") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_86") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_87") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_88")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_dop_9
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("QuietDialogue01")
AddCinematicMessage( 18, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 19, 0.5 )
TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_91") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_92")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_dop_10
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("QuietDialogue03")
AddCinematicMessage( 20, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 21, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 22, 0.5 )
TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_101") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_102") TActivate("Kochewnik_cin1_dop_103")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_dop_11
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("2_path") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_2" ) TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_3" ) TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_4" ) TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_5" ) TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_6" ) TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_7" ) TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_8" ) TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_9" ) TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_10" ) TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_11" ) TDeactivate( "Nachalo_cin_dop_12" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_71" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_72" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_81" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_82" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_83" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_84" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_85" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_86" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_87" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_88" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_91" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_92" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_101" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_102" ) TDeactivate( "Kochewnik_cin1_dop_103" )
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
PassToMap("r1m2", "FromR1M1", -1, true )
trigger:Deactivate()
